title: Branch - Restaurant Web Design
short_description: Branch is a single-page, mobile-first website designed for a local restaurant targeting both tourists and locals.
overview: Branch is a responsive, single-page mobile website designed for a local restaurant with a diverse customer base. The project focused on usability, accessibility, and clear content hierarchy—ensuring both international tourists and local diners could navigate the site with ease and confidence.
challenge: Key challenges included designing a content-rich single-page layout without overwhelming users, enabling seamless multilingual support for international guests, and optimizing the experience for mobile-first usage. The site needed to convey all essential information—menu, hours, reservations, location—quickly and clearly while maintaining a strong visual identity.
solution: The design process began with persona development and journey mapping to understand the needs of both tourist and local user groups. From these insights, a clear information architecture was developed to support fast access to key content. An AI-powered translation feature addressed language barriers, while a hamburger menu simplified navigation across the page. Wireframes were iteratively tested and refined to ensure a smooth, intuitive flow for mobile users while remaining scalable for desktop viewing.
result: The final product is a sleek, single-page mobile website that balances clarity and functionality. Its adaptive structure, thoughtful interaction design, and AI-driven accessibility features offer a welcoming and efficient experience for a global audience. The project reflects a strategic blend of UX research, responsive interface design, and inclusive user experience.
